title: Can I survive this jump? (CISTJ)
description: Shows your remaining health after falling onto the block you’re looking at, in a customizable HUD.
body:
## Features
- Shows your remaining health after falling onto the block you’re looking at, considering all important factors such as armor, enchantments, status effects, and surface.
- To customize the HUD position, run: /CISTJ editPos

## Questions? Issues? Feature Requests?

Please note that you might die if your remaining health is .5 hearts, in case you are not falling down but jumping (which increases the fall distance). For that reason, it is displayed orange.

Feel free to join the Discord ( https://www.lucasedvk.de/discord ) or send me a PM on Discord (Lucas.EDVK).

Issues and feature requests are encouraged to be reported on GitLab. Discord is also fine. Thank you!!

## Dependencies

No need to install any other mod than [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api).

Please note that [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) is required to access the config GUI.

## Disclaimer

This mod may be considered a cheat on some servers. On most servers, it should be fine, but please read the server rules carefully and ask staff if in doubt.

Are you a server owner? Contact me (e. g. via Discord: Lucas.EDVK) to opt-out and disable the mod on your server. Verification might be required.

## Quality Assurance

My code and description are at least 90 % human-written. Only the icon was made using generative AI.
Also, my goal is to port to new Minecraft versions asap. All my mods were updated from 1.21. within 1 week of the release of 26.1.

#HumanWritten

## Special Thanks

Special Thanks to [Motschen](https://modrinth.com/user/Motschen) for providing this awesome config library with jar-in-jar option!
